__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Ashoka Pillars,Cell Theory,Science Inaugural Issue,I Ching,Painted Pottery King
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 2 Bionic Parts extracted, Snail Oblivion Power +10; Bionic Part Extracted: 120/120
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Oblivion Power Boost]]
